title: Gyro Zeppeli Hat
description: This resource pack was created specifically for fans of the anime “JoJo”, namely such a character as Gyro Zeppeli from season 7. He allows you to rename the carved pumpkin "Шляпа Джайро Цеппели" and it will make a beautiful hat
body: This resource pack was created specifically for fans of the anime “JoJo”, namely such a character as Gyro Zeppeli from season 7. He allows you to rename the carved pumpkin "Шляпа Джайро Цеппели" and it will make a beautiful hat
